2026-0437
2026-05-08NA, CIRNACYukon ActRelinquishement of the administration and control from the Commissioner of Yukon Order approving the relinquishment in perpetuity, by the Commissioner of Yukon, of the administration and control of the public real properties located in the community of Ross River, Yukon, and transfer of the administration of those properties to the Minister of Northern Affairs.N/A
subject: Relinquishement of the administration and control from the Commissioner of Yukon
precis: Order approving the relinquishment in perpetuity, by the Commissioner of Yukon, of the administration and control of the public real properties located in the community of Ross River, Yukon, and transfer of the administration of those properties to the Minister of Northern Affairs.
